item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n10","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant stayed asleep and answered directly: it identified plausible main causes and responsibility boundaries for each of the three count-only complaints, then gave a usable recap conclusion.
